title: Vietnamese Tofu Bowl
description: A creamy and flavorful Vietnamese-inspired bowl dish made with tofu and various vegetables. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bean sprouts, carrots, and bell peppers

ingredients.name: Fresh herbs
ingredients.notes: such as cilantro, basil, and mint

instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Cut the tofu into bite-sized pieces and pan-fry until golden brown.
In a separate pan, heat the creamy peanut sauce over medium heat.
Add the mixed vegetables to the peanut sauce and stir-fry until tender.
To assemble the bowls, place a portion of noodles at the bottom, followed by the tofu and vegetable mixture.
Garnish with fresh herbs and sliced green onions.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
